rules.name: Potential Information Exposure via Log Analysis

shortDescription.text: This skill processes local logs that may contain sensitive user data, posing a risk of information exposure if not handled carefully.

fullDescription.text: The 'introspect' skill is designed to analyze local Claude Code session logs. While the skill itself is not malicious and its intent is benign, these logs can contain sensitive information such as user interactions, tool outputs, or even credentials. Users should be aware of the data contained within these logs and exercise caution when processing or sharing them to prevent unintended information exposure. The skill's own 'Privacy Considerations' section highlights this inherent risk.

message.text: Threat intelligence strongly confirmed the legitimate purpose of the 'introspect' skill as a log analysis tool via a LobeHub marketplace listing (https://lobehub.com/skills/0xdarkmatter-claude-mods-introspect). No confirmed malicious intent was found. However, the skill's core function of processing local Claude session logs carries an inherent risk of sensitive information exposure, as these logs may contain sensitive user data. The initial analysis correctly identified 'Privacy Considerations' regarding sensitive data in logs, which aligns with this finding.
